name: Premium Makhana (Fox Nuts)
desc: Hand-picked lotus seeds from the pristine wetlands of Darbhanga. Sun-dried, roasted and packed fresh. Naturally rich in protein, calcium and antioxidants — a true Bihar superfood recognized globally.

name: Madhubani Painting — Fish Motif
desc: Authentic Madhubani painting depicting the sacred fish motif. Natural vegetable colors on handmade paper.

name: Bhagalpuri Silk Saree
desc: Authentic Tussar silk saree from Bhagalpur, handwoven on traditional pit-looms by fourth-generation weavers.

name: Shahi Litchi — Fresh
desc: The world-famous GI-tagged Shahi Litchi from Muzaffarpur. Dispatched within 12 hours of harvest.

name: Silao Khaja
desc: The legendary flaky sweet from Silao, made from refined flour, sugar and pure ghee using a century-old recipe.

name: Katarni Rice
desc: The aromatic GI-tagged Katarni rice — known for its distinct fragrance, slim grain and soft texture.

name: Jardalu Mango
desc: The royal GI-tagged Jardalu mango of Bhagalpur — celebrated for its distinct sweet taste and creamy texture.

name: Madhubani Hand-Painted Dupatta
desc: Cotton dupatta hand-painted with traditional Madhubani motifs using eco-friendly natural colors.

name: Bhagalpur Mango Pickle
desc: Traditional mango pickle made from Jardalu mangoes, hand-crafted using a generations-old recipe.

name: Tikuli Art Wall Piece
desc: Traditional Bihari Tikuli art wall piece with intricate geometric patterns and floral motifs.

name: Shahi Litchi Juice
desc: Pure cold-pressed juice from GI-tagged Shahi Litchi. No added sugar, no preservatives.

name: Sikki Grass Basket
desc: Handwoven basket made from Sikki grass — a traditional Bihar craft practiced by women artisans.
